title: Sonic Bumpers - S1 Bumper
description: Bouncing away with custom block names, SFX and subtitles, 1991 style.
body: Another Sonic themed pack (and I have somewhat recovered from my burnout)! This time, it's an Bumper from Sonic 1 over the Slime Block, with lang files for custom block name and custom captions, with the original SFX from S1 replacing the normal Slime Block sounds! I hope y'all enjoy it, S2 Bumpers should be coming in a later date.
